titleStmt.title: SII 38.273: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 273. (A.R. No. 273 of 1912.) NERUMBŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west base, Tiruvālīśvara temple.

summary.p: Records that the ūravargaḷ of Nerumbūr in Kaḷattūr-paṟṟu assigned the taxes (pala-upādigaḷ) on one vēli of land which was donated earlier and also the taxes accrued from the quarters around the temple (tirumaḍaiviḷāgam) for providing food offerings, conducting other rituals and services to the god Tiruvāymīsuram-uḍaiya nāyaṉār of Nerumūr from the month of Tai. It is also recorded that the land (which was previously assigned) for the livelihood of bhaṭṭa (bhaṭṭavritti) were excluded from the purview of the grant.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . cakalalokacakkaravattikaḷ Irājanārāyaṇaṉ campuvarāyarkku yāṇṭu 9vatu tirumukappaṭi kaḷattūr paṟṟu nerumur Ūravarkaḷ pucai pātiyum paṭṭaviruttiyum nikki Ivvūril Uṭaiyār tiruvāymicuramuṭaiyaṉāya
ṉārkku Amutupaṭikkum kaṟiamutu veñcaṉattukkum tiruppaṇikkum palapaṇi nimantattukkum Oṉpatāvatu taimāta mutalukku Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉamāṉa nilattile muṉputāṅkaḷ viṭṭa nilamey paThe letter ‘pa’ is engraved below.la Upātikaḷum Uṭpaṭa nāṭṭaḷavu kolā
le nāmviṭṭa Oru veli nilamum tirumaṭaiviḷākamum caṟuvamāṉiyamāka kuṭuttom Iṉṉāḷ mutal Ippaṭi ceyvateIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.273 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
